title: MarTech & Innovation (Tampines MRT)
description:
HR Tech Specialist in the childcare sector
LEARNING KIDZ at Tampines

$3500-$4300

Roles And Responsibilities: 

Job Description: 

• Software Design & Development: Create and implement software applications by understanding project requirements and designing appropriate architectures. This includes writing clean, efficient, and maintainable code using multiple programming skills such as C#/C++, Java, SQL, Node.js, Vue, Mobile App (Android, iOS) or Web App (HTM5, PHP, JavaScript) and latest industrial trends language. 

  • Testing & Debugging: Conduct thorough testing to ensure software functionality and reliability. Identify and fix bugs or issues during development and after deployment. 

  • Documentation: Produce and maintain documentation that explains software applications, including user manuals and technical specifications, to assist users and future developers. 

  • Maintenance & Support: Provide ongoing support for software applications, including troubleshooting issues, implementing updates, and ensuring optimal performance. 

🤝 Collaboration & Project Management 

  • Team Collaboration: Work closely with other developers, designers, project managers, and stakeholders to deliver software solutions that meet business needs. 

  • Agile Methodologies: Participate in agile development processes, including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives, to ensure timely and efficient delivery of software projects. 

  • Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD): Utilize CI/CD pipelines to automate the building, testing, and deployment of applications, ensuring rapid and reliable software delivery. 

Requirements: 

  • Educational Background: A bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field is typically required. 

  • Technical Proficiency: Strong programming skills and familiarity with frameworks and tools relevant to the development environment. 

  • Problem-Solving Abilities: Excellent analytical skills to identify issues and develop effective solutions. 

  • Communication Skills: Ability to communicate technical concepts clearly to team members and stakeholders. 

    State your expected salary and resume to hr@learningkidz.com.sg

postedCompany.description: Learning Kidz was first established in May 2002 with a mission to develop each child to their full potential by providing equal opportunities and quality care in a safe, conducive and caring enviroment. At Learning Kidz, we cultivate and promote Kindness and Integrity in everything we do. We are fully committed to nurturing our children and preparing them for the challenges of formal education. Currently, we operate 6 childcare centres and 2 enrichment branches across Singapore with a drive to bring smiles across our little ones' faces everyday.  We have 2 infant care services at Ang Mo kio (Mrt) and Tampines (Mrt). We are also under POP and Spark.
postedCompany.name: LEARNING KIDZ ACADEMY PTE. LTD.
